descriptions.prod-001: Our Heritage Oak Base Cabinet brings warmth and durability to any Canadian kitchen. Crafted from sustainably sourced solid oak with dovetail drawer construction and full-extension soft-close glides. Each piece is hand-finished at our 40,000 sq. ft. Brantford facility.
descriptions.prod-002: A timeless Shaker-style base cabinet in a crisp painted white finish. Features a sturdy MDF frame with concealed adjustable hinges, deep drawers, and a durable top-coat lacquer that resists everyday kitchen wear.
descriptions.prod-003: Exquisite solid walnut base cabinet for discerning homeowners. The rich, natural grain of North American black walnut makes every piece unique. Finished with an open-pore oil that enhances depth while protecting the surface.
descriptions.prod-004: Sleek high-gloss white wall cabinet with push-to-open hardware for a handleless modern kitchen aesthetic. The reflective surface amplifies natural light and creates an airy, spacious feel.
descriptions.prod-005: Make a bold statement with our Painted Blue Shaker wall cabinet. A rich navy-meets-slate custom paint is applied over our solid MDF Shaker door with a clear protective lacquer topcoat.
descriptions.prod-006: Match your Heritage Oak Base set with these companion upper cabinets. The consistent grain-matched panels and coordinated finish create a seamless, high-end kitchen design.
descriptions.prod-007: Maximize your kitchen corner with our precision-engineered angled corner base cabinet. Features a full lazy-susan rotating shelf system for effortless access to every stored item. Pairs seamlessly with our Heritage and Shaker series.
descriptions.prod-008: Our blind corner wall cabinet comes with a patented pull-out organizer system that brings hidden items to the front for full visibility. No more lost items in the back of your corner cabinet.
descriptions.prod-009: A commanding floor-to-ceiling Shaker tall cabinet that provides generous storage for appliances, dry goods, or pantry items. Built with our signature plywood box construction and adjustable shelf system.
descriptions.prod-010: A beautifully crafted freestanding pantry cabinet in solid oak. Features deep pull-out drawers at the base, adjustable mid-shelves, and two doors above for organized pantry storage.
descriptions.prod-011: The ultimate solution for narrow spaces: a full-height pantry cabinet with 8 pull-out wire baskets that slide out for easy access. Ideal for filling gaps between appliances or in butler's pantry areas.
descriptions.prod-012: A modern wall-mounted floating vanity in matte white finish. The clean lines and concealed mounting bracket create the illusion of floating, making your bathroom feel larger. Ships with a solid wood carcass and soft-close door.
descriptions.prod-013: Perfect for a master ensuite, our 60" double-sink vanity offers individual storage zones for two. Features 6 soft-close drawers and 2 door compartments in a sophisticated charcoal grey finish with brushed gold hardware.
descriptions.prod-014: A rustic yet refined farmhouse-style vanity with a complementary framed mirror. The warm cream finish and shiplap-inspired door panels bring cottage charm to any bathroom, while the interior features modern soft-close hardware.
descriptions.prod-015: Compact and stylish, this wall-hung 24" vanity is the perfect solution for smaller bathrooms or powder rooms. The matte black finish adds a bold contemporary touch to any space.
descriptions.prod-016: Transform your walk-in closet with our fully customizable modular system. Includes hanging rails, adjustable shelves, drawer units, and a shoe rack. Engineered for Canadian homes with moisture-resistant finishes and AWMAC-certified construction.
descriptions.prod-017: A sleek floor-to-ceiling wardrobe with whisper-quiet sliding doors on premium aluminium tracks. The mirrored door option reflects light beautifully while making the room appear larger.
descriptions.prod-018: Upgrade a standard reach-in closet with this comprehensive organizer system. Ships as a complete kit with all mounting hardware. Installation takes just a few hours with our included step-by-step guide.
descriptions.prod-019: A freestanding wardrobe cabinet that combines hanging space above with generous deep-drawer storage below. The solid maple construction ensures decades of use, while the natural finish complements any bedroom décor.
descriptions.prod-020: Low-profile mid-century modern TV console with elegant tapered solid wood legs. Features two fluted door cabinets flanking a central open shelf, all in a warm walnut finish that pairs beautifully with contemporary or transitional interiors.
descriptions.prod-021: A wall-mounted floating TV unit in matte grey that keeps your floor space open and your living room visually expansive. Features LED-backlit open shelving, two concealed door compartments, and integrated cable management.
descriptions.prod-022: A statement full-wall entertainment unit designed to be the focal point of your living room. Includes a central TV niche, flanking bookshelves, base cabinets, and an integrated electric fireplace alcove.
descriptions.prod-023: A practical and handsome solid birch media console with ample storage for gaming consoles, media players, and accessories. Two drawers and two cabinets keep everything organized while the open central shelf provides easy access.
descriptions.prod-024: Command your home office with this solid walnut executive cabinet. Features a locking filing drawer, an adjustable bookcase section, and concealed storage for office supplies. Built for executives who value both function and presence.
descriptions.prod-025: A sturdy lateral filing cabinet with full-extension ball-bearing drawers, anti-tilt mechanism, and a central lock. Accepts both letter and legal-size hanging folders. The painted grey finish works in any professional setting.
descriptions.prod-026: A classic open bookcase with adjustable shelves, perfect for displaying books, binders, or decorative objects. The solid oak frame and natural finish add warmth to any home library or study.
descriptions.prod-027: A tall, narrow storage tower designed for home offices where floor space is at a premium. Features a combination of open shelves, closed door compartments, and a dedicated printer tray.
descriptions.prod-028: A complete laundry room transformation kit. Includes upper cabinets that span above your washer/dryer, a tall broom/utility cabinet, and a base cabinet with pull-out hamper. All in a crisp white finish with moisture-resistant treatment.
descriptions.prod-029: Make the most of your laundry room's vertical space with this stackable above-washer/dryer cabinet. The pull-down shelf mechanism brings high-stored items within easy reach without requiring a step stool.
descriptions.prod-030: A purpose-built base cabinet for a laundry room utility sink. Features an open under-sink compartment for plumbing access and two flanking door compartments for cleaning supply storage.
descriptions.prod-031: Transform your kitchen with this statement island cabinet. Features a contrasting painted grey body with a natural oak top rail, 4 deep drawers, 2 large door compartments, and seating overhang on one side for 3 bar stools.
descriptions.prod-032: A full-round lazy susan corner cabinet that spins 360° for effortless access to every item stored inside. The bi-fold doors open smoothly and the robust rotating tray system is rated for 40 lbs per shelf.

sampleReviews.name: Michael T.
sampleReviews.text: Exceptional quality. The craftsmanship is evident the moment you see it. Installed perfectly and the finish is flawless.

sampleReviews.name: Sarah L.
sampleReviews.text: Sandha Woodworks delivered exactly what was promised and on time. The soft-close mechanism works beautifully.

sampleReviews.name: David K.
sampleReviews.text: Very happy with the purchase. Took a week longer than expected but the quality is excellent.
